title: wood.jar
description: A player who watches from afar will soon learn about the dimension, you build a portal and disappear into their dimension
body:
**wood.jar** is a fan-made modification for Minecraft, inspired by the works of Studio Allka. This is an unofficial project.

The mod focuses on survival mechanics, exploring custom environments, and defending against unique entity waves.

---

### 🌲 Main Features

* **Custom Dimension & Travel:** Features a unique custom dimension that players can access through portal building. This dimension introduces a distorted world generation layout and custom biomes.
* **The "Wood Attack" Event:** Includes a dynamic survival event where an aggressive onslaught of custom entities (the Wood Army) spawns to attack the player.
* **Unique Entity AI:** Introduces a hostile entity with custom stalking and tracking behavior that interacts with the world chunks and follows the player.

---

### 🛠 Technical Requirements
* **Environment:** Client and Server configurations should match the required mod version settings.
* **Compatibility:** Compatible with standard optimization mods.
